apps.name: twitter
apps.description: Compose, schedule, and publish tweets. Manages drafts locally and queues sends through the platform.

apps.name: linkedin
apps.description: Compose, schedule, and publish LinkedIn posts (up to 3,000 chars). Drafts → queue → publish lifecycle.

apps.name: reddit
apps.description: Compose and submit Reddit text posts to specific subreddits, with title + Markdown body and scheduled-publish support.

apps.name: gmail
apps.description: Search Gmail threads, draft replies locally, and send via the Gmail API. Pin threads as workspace outputs for CRM follow-up.

apps.name: github
apps.description: Read-only GitHub digests — recent commits, PRs, releases, and repo activity windows.

apps.name: sheets
apps.description: Google Sheets CRUD — read rows by header, append, update by row, with auto-publish of contact-row outputs for CRM workflows.

apps.name: calcom
apps.description: Cal.com event types, bookings, availability, reschedule, and cancel — surfaced through the agent's tool catalog.

apps.name: attio
apps.description: Attio CRM — find / create / update people and companies with dynamic schema discovery; add notes, tasks, and pipeline stages.

apps.name: apollo
apps.description: Apollo.io prospecting — search people / organizations, enrich emails, and orchestrate outbound email sequences.

apps.name: zoominfo
apps.description: ZoomInfo B2B intelligence — search contacts and companies, fetch firmographics + intent signals, inspect org charts.

apps.name: instantly
apps.description: Instantly cold email — manage campaigns, leads, and stats; idempotent pause / resume for in-flight outbound.

apps.name: hubspot
apps.description: HubSpot CRM — contacts, companies, deals with dynamic property discovery; pipelines + stages enforced; notes and tasks.
